title: [Cobblemon] Pet a poke
description: Finally, you can tell your Wooloo whose been a good mon
body:
Ever wanted to pet your cute pokemon? Well now you can!

Added a "Pet your pokemon" option to the shift-righ click menu. When petting your friendship points will go up a bit.

![Pet the Wooloo!](https://i.imgur.com/8bLACnL.gif)

I'll be changing the icon picture later, but till then [the adorable wooloo was sourced from here](https://www.furaffinity.net/view/31827588/)
Coding of the mod was made using www.player.games
